headline: Ethisphere Names Rockwell Automation as One of the 2026 World's Most Ethical Companies
summary: NORTHAMPTON, MA / ACCESS Newswire / March 18, 2026 / Rockwell Automation, Inc. (NYSE:ROK), the world's largest company dedicated to industrial automation and digital transformation, has been recognized as one of the 2026 World's Most Ethical Companies® ...
